# Prompting agents I: giving context

<!-- source: 07-ai-powered-analysis-workflows.qmd, sections "Giving context",
     "Attaching data or data summaries", "Attach domain knowledge" -->

How to feed an agent the context it needs: data summaries, metadata, and trusted domain knowledge.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge comparing agent output with and without an attached data summary.
:::
